name: Wall Push-Up
description: Stand facing a wall with hands at shoulder height and push your body away from the wall.

name: Standard Push-Up
description: From a high plank, lower your chest to the floor and push back up while maintaining a straight body line.

name: Wide Push-Up
description: Hands placed significantly wider than shoulder-width apart, shifting emphasis to the outer chest.

name: Diamond Push-Up
description: Hands placed together forming a diamond shape, dramatically increasing triceps activation.

name: Decline Push-Up
description: Feet elevated on a bench with hands on the floor, shifting more weight onto the upper chest and shoulders.

name: Archer Push-Up
description: From a wide hand position, lower your chest toward one hand while the opposite arm straightens to the side.

name: Typewriter Push-Up
description: From the bottom of a wide push-up, move your chest horizontally from one hand to the other without rising.

name: One-Arm Push-Up
description: A push-up performed with only one arm, the other held behind the back. Feet placed wider for stability.

name: Pseudo Planche Push-Up
description: Hands placed near the hips with a forward lean, bridging the gap between push-ups and planche work.

name: Hindu Push-Up
description: A flowing movement from downward dog through a swooping motion into cobra pose.

name: Sphinx Push-Up
description: From plank, lower forearms to the floor then push back up. Mimics a bodyweight skull crusher.

name: Scapula Push-Up
description: From high plank, keep arms straight and only protract and retract the shoulder blades.

name: Spiderman Push-Up
description: During each push-up, bring one knee toward the same-side elbow, alternating sides.

name: Dive Bomber Push-Up
description: Similar to Hindu push-up but the return path reverses the swooping motion.

name: Ring Push-Up
description: Push-up performed on gymnastic rings, greatly increasing stabilizer muscle recruitment.
progression_3: Ring Push-Up with Rings Turned Out

name: Maltese Push-Up
description: Elite push-up with hands placed wide and low near the hips, fingers pointing outward.

name: Clap Push-Up
description: Explosive push-up where you clap hands in the air before landing.

name: Superman Push-Up
description: Explosive push-up where both hands and feet leave the ground, body fully extended in the air.

name: Pike Push-Up
description: From an inverted V position, bend elbows and lower head toward the ground. Mimics overhead press.

name: Wall Handstand Push-Up
primary_muscles: [anterior deltoids, lateral deltoids, triceps, upper trapezius]
description: Kick up to handstand against wall and perform vertical push-ups.

name: Deficit Handstand Push-Up
description: Handstand push-up on parallettes allowing head to descend below hand level.

name: Freestanding Handstand Push-Up
description: Handstand push-up without wall support, requiring balance and pressing strength.
progression_1: Wall HSPU with Light Foot Contact

name: 90-Degree Handstand Push-Up
description: From handstand, lower to a 90-degree hold with body parallel to ground, then press back up.

name: Bench Dip
description: Hands on a bench behind you, lower body by bending elbows then press back up.

name: Parallel Bar Dip
description: Lower yourself between parallel bars until upper arms are parallel, then press back up.

name: Forward Lean Dip
description: Dip with intentional forward lean, shifting emphasis to the chest.

name: Straight Bar Dip
description: Dip on a single straight bar, important for muscle-up training.
progression_3: Straight Bar Dip with Forward Lean

name: Korean Dip
description: Dip with bar behind the body, requiring shoulder flexibility and pressing strength.

name: Ring Dip
description: Dips on gymnastic rings requiring massive stabilizer engagement.
progression_3: Ring Dip with Rings Turned Out

name: L-Sit Dip
primary_muscles: [triceps, chest, anterior deltoids, hip flexors, core]
description: Dip while holding legs straight out in L-sit position.

name: Planche Lean
description: From push-up position, lean forward shifting weight over hands with arms straight.

name: Tuck Planche
primary_muscles: [anterior deltoids, chest, serratus anterior, triceps, core]
description: Isometric hold with knees tucked while balancing on straight arms, feet off ground.

name: Straddle Planche
primary_muscles: [anterior deltoids, chest, serratus anterior, triceps, core]
description: Planche hold with legs spread wide, reducing lever arm compared to full planche.

name: Full Planche
primary_muscles: [anterior deltoids, chest, serratus anterior, triceps, core, glutes]
description: Elite isometric hold with entire body horizontal and straight, supported on hands with arms locked.

name: Planche Push-Up
description: Push-up performed while maintaining a planche position throughout.

name: Ring Fly
description: On rings, let arms open wide then squeeze back together. Bodyweight dumbbell fly equivalent.

name: Dead Hang
description: Hang from a bar with arms fully extended, building foundational grip strength and shoulder stability.

name: Scapular Pull-Up
description: From dead hang, retract and depress shoulder blades without bending arms.

name: Inverted Row
description: Lie under a low bar and pull chest to bar. The bodyweight equivalent of a barbell row.

name: Wide-Grip Inverted Row
description: Inverted row with hands wider than shoulder width, elbows flaring out.

name: Ring Row
description: Inverted row on gymnastic rings, demanding greater stabilization.

name: One-Arm Inverted Row
description: Inverted row pulling with one arm, developing unilateral strength.

name: Standard Pull-Up
description: Hang from a bar with palms facing away, pull chin over the bar.

name: Chin-Up
description: Pull-up with palms facing you. Greater bicep activation than standard pull-up.

name: Wide-Grip Pull-Up
description: Pull-up with hands significantly wider than shoulder width, maximally targeting upper lats.

name: Close-Grip Pull-Up
description: Pull-up with hands close together, increasing range of motion.

name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
description: Pull-up with palms facing each other on parallel handles. Most shoulder-friendly grip.

name: Commando Pull-Up
description: Grip bar with hands stacked, pull up alternating head to each side.

name: L-Sit Pull-Up
description: Hold legs horizontally while performing a pull-up.

name: Archer Pull-Up
description: Wide grip; pull body toward one hand while the other arm stays extended along the bar.

name: Typewriter Pull-Up
description: Pull up to one side, traverse horizontally to the other while staying at top position.

name: One-Arm Pull-Up
description: Pull yourself up using only one arm. Requires extraordinary pulling strength.

name: Towel Pull-Up
description: Pull-ups gripping towels draped over bar, massively challenging grip strength.

name: Explosive Pull-Up
description: Pull up with maximum force so chest reaches bar or higher.

name: Bar Muscle-Up
description: Pull yourself over the bar and transition into a dip position on top.

name: Ring Muscle-Up
description: Muscle-up on rings requiring greater control through the transition.

name: Tuck Front Lever
description: Hang from bar, tuck knees to chest, hold body horizontal face up.

name: Full Front Lever
description: Hold body perfectly horizontal face-up with legs extended while hanging from bar.

name: Front Lever Row
description: From front lever position, perform a rowing motion pulling bar toward waist.

name: Skin the Cat
description: From dead hang, rotate body backward through inverted hang to German hang and back.

name: Tuck Back Lever
description: From inverted hang, lower into horizontal position face-down with knees tucked.

name: Full Back Lever
description: Hold body horizontal face-down with legs extended. Extreme shoulder and bicep demand.

name: Headbanger Pull-Up
description: At top of pull-up, rock body toward and away from bar horizontally to isolate biceps.

name: Pelican Curl
description: On rings, lean forward with arms behind, then curl back up. Hardest bodyweight bicep exercise.

name: Ring Bicep Curl
description: Hold rings, lean back with straight body, curl yourself up by bending only at elbows.

name: Ice Cream Maker
description: From top of pull-up, extend to front lever then pull back. Transitions repeatedly.

name: Ring Face Pull
description: Using rings, pull toward face with elbows high and externally rotate at top.

name: Bodyweight Squat
description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, lower hips until thighs are parallel, then return to standing.

name: Pistol Squat
description: Full single-leg squat with non-working leg extended straight forward.

name: Shrimp Squat
description: Single-leg squat with non-working leg held behind, heel toward glutes.

name: Dragon Squat
description: Advanced single-leg squat where non-working leg crosses behind like a dragon's tail.
progression_3: Full Dragon Squat on Flat Ground

name: Skater Squat
description: Single-leg squat with non-working leg floating behind, no hand hold.

name: Sissy Squat
description: Hips locked forward, lean backward, all movement at knee. Uniquely isolates quads.

name: Cossack Squat
description: Deep lateral squat, one leg full depth while other extends straight to the side.

name: Archer Squat
description: Wide-stance squat shifting weight to one leg while other extends straight.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Single-leg squat with rear foot elevated on bench behind you.
progression_1: Standard Split Squat (both feet on ground)

name: Hindu Squat
description: Flowing squat rising onto toes at bottom with arm swing for momentum.

name: Wall Sit
description: Isometric hold with back against wall, thighs parallel to floor.

name: Forward Lunge
description: Step forward into split stance, lower until both knees at 90 degrees.

name: Reverse Lunge
description: Step backward into lunge. Easier on knees, more glute emphasis.

name: Curtsy Lunge
description: Step one leg diagonally behind the other into a cross-legged lunge.

name: Lateral Lunge
description: Step wide to one side, bending that knee while keeping other leg straight.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
description: Kneeling with feet anchored, slowly lower torso toward floor using hamstring eccentric control.

name: Sliding Leg Curl
description: Lying supine with heels on sliders, bridge up then slide feet away and back.

name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
description: Stand on one leg, hinge at hips, extend free leg behind as torso lowers.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Lying supine, knees bent, drive hips up by squeezing glutes.

name: Hip Thrust
description: Shoulders on bench, feet on floor, drive hips to full extension.

name: Donkey Kick
description: From hands-and-knees, kick one bent leg back and up, squeezing glute at top.

name: Step-Up
description: Step onto a raised surface with one leg, drive through heel to stand on top.

name: Step-Up with Knee Drive
description: Step-up with explosive knee drive at the top, mimicking sprint mechanics.

name: Deficit Step-Down
description: Stand on raised surface, slowly lower one foot below edge. Eccentric quad exercise.
progression_3: High Deficit with Hold at Bottom

name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
description: Calf raise on one foot, doubling the load compared to double-leg.
progression_1: Single-Leg Calf Raise on Flat Ground
progression_2: Single-Leg Calf Raise on Step Edge
progression_3: Single-Leg Slow Tempo Calf Raise (3s up, 3s down)

name: Tibialis Raise
description: Back against wall, raise toes toward shins. Strengthens front of shin.

name: Jump Squat
description: From squat, explode upward into a jump, landing softly.

name: Box Jump
description: Jump from ground onto raised platform, landing softly with both feet.

name: Lunge Jump
description: From lunge, jump and switch legs mid-air, landing in opposite lunge.

name: Frog Jump
description: From deep squat, jump forward as far as possible, landing in squat.

name: Skater Bound
description: Leap laterally from one foot to the other, mimicking speed-skating.

name: Forearm Plank
description: Hold a rigid body position on forearms and toes, straight line from head to heels.

name: Side Plank
description: Lateral hold on one forearm and side of foot, body in straight line.
progression_3: Side Plank with Top Leg Raised

name: Side Plank with Rotation
description: From side plank, rotate top arm under torso then back up. Thread the needle.
progression_2: Full Side Plank Thread the Needle
progression_3: Thread the Needle with Hold at Bottom

name: Hollow Body Hold
description: Lying supine, lift shoulders and legs off ground, pressing lower back into floor.

name: Hollow Body Rock
description: Maintain hollow body while rocking back and forth like a rocking chair.

name: Dead Bug
description: Lying supine, alternately extend opposite arm and leg while keeping lower back pressed down.

name: L-Sit
description: Support body on hands with legs held horizontally forming an L shape.

name: V-Sit
description: Advanced L-sit with legs raised above horizontal forming a V shape.

name: Manna
primary_muscles: [hip flexors, rectus abdominis, rear deltoids, wrists]
description: Ultimate compression hold - legs raised past vertical behind body while on hands.

name: Dragon Flag
primary_muscles: [rectus abdominis, transverse abdominis, obliques, hip flexors]
description: On a bench, grip behind head, raise body to vertical then lower in straight line.
progression_2: Half-Lay Dragon Flag (hips extended, knees bent)

name: Hanging Knee Raise
description: Hang from bar and raise knees toward chest without swinging.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hang from bar and raise straight legs to horizontal or higher.
progression_3: Full Hanging Leg Raise (toes to bar)

name: Windshield Wiper
description: Hang from bar, raise legs to bar, then rotate straight legs side to side.

name: Human Flag
description: Hold body horizontally sideways on a vertical pole, one arm pushing one pulling.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: Roll ab wheel forward extending body while resisting spinal extension, then pull back.

name: Russian Twist
description: Seated with feet off ground, rotate torso side to side.
progression_1: Russian Twist with Feet on Ground

name: Bicycle Crunch
description: Lying supine, bring opposite elbow to opposite knee in a pedaling motion.

name: Bird Dog
description: From quadruped, extend opposite arm and leg while keeping torso stable.

name: Superman Hold
description: Lying face-down, lift arms and legs off ground simultaneously.

name: Arch Body Hold
description: Posterior counterpart to hollow body - lie face-down, lift arms and legs in sustained arch.

name: Reverse Crunch
description: Lying supine, bring knees toward chest and lift hips off ground.

name: V-Up
description: Lying flat, simultaneously raise straight legs and torso to touch toes forming a V.

name: Mountain Climber
description: From high plank, rapidly alternate driving each knee toward chest.

name: Lying Leg Raise
description: Lying supine, raise straight legs from floor to vertical and lower with control.
progression_3: Slow Negative Leg Raise (1 inch off floor)

name: Pike Compression
description: Seated with legs straight, actively pull torso to thighs using hip flexor strength.

name: Plank Shoulder Tap
description: From high plank, alternately tap opposite shoulder resisting torso rotation.

name: Body Saw
description: From forearm plank, rock body forward and backward increasing lever arm.
progression_3: Body Saw with Feet on Sliders

name: Handstand Hold
description: Balancing upside-down on hands with body in straight vertical line.

name: Press to Handstand
description: Controlled strength-based entry into handstand from standing, no kicking.

name: Elbow Lever
description: Balancing body horizontally face-down on bent elbows pressed into abdomen.

name: Crow Pose
description: Arm balance with knees resting on backs of upper arms, leaning forward on hands.
progression_3: Crane Pose (arms straight, no elbow contact)

name: Iron Cross
description: On rings, hang upright with arms extended straight out to sides forming a cross.

name: Maltese Cross
description: Horizontal hold on rings with arms extended laterally, body parallel to ground.

name: Victorian Cross
description: On rings, body horizontal face-down with arms extended laterally. Inverted maltese.

name: Ring Support Hold
description: Top of dip position on rings with arms locked out and rings turned out.

name: Back Bridge
description: Press up into full backbend, hands and feet on ground forming inverted U.

name: Neck Bridge
description: Bridging onto top of head/neck with back arched, feet on floor.
progression_2: Full Neck Bridge (head and feet only)

name: Japanese Handstand
description: Handstand on rings with exaggerated lean, hands near hip level.

name: Straight-Arm Press
description: From planche, press upward into handstand with arms remaining straight throughout.
progression_1: Tuck Planche to Tuck Handstand Press
progression_2: Straddle Planche to Straddle Handstand Press

name: Tiger Bend Handstand Push-Up
description: From handstand, lower onto forearms then press back up to full handstand.

name: Burpee
description: Drop to push-up, perform push-up, jump feet forward, jump up with arms overhead.

name: Burpee Pull-Up
description: Burpee under a bar, then jump to grab bar and perform a pull-up.

name: Depth Jump
description: Step off box, land briefly, then immediately rebound into maximal vertical jump.

name: Bear Crawl
description: On hands and feet with knees hovering, crawl forward with opposite hand-foot pairs.

name: Crab Walk
description: Face-up tabletop position, walk forward/backward/sideways.

name: Front Kickthrough
description: From beast position, lift hand and kick opposite leg under body, rotating to seated position.

name: Aztec Push-Up
description: Explosive push-up where whole body launches, pike in air touching toes with hands.

name: Plyo Dip
description: On dip bars, explode upward so hands leave the bars at top.
progression_2: Plyo Dip with Brief Hand Release

name: Kip-Up
description: From lying flat, explosively roll and thrust hips to spring onto feet.

name: Bar Pullover
description: From dead hang, swing legs up and over bar, rotating around to support position.

name: Inchworm
description: From standing, fold forward, walk hands to plank, walk feet to hands, stand.

name: Star Jump
description: From squat, jump explosively extending arms and legs into X shape at peak.

name: Shoulder Dislocate
description: Hold stick/band wide, rotate overhead and behind back in smooth arc.

name: Wall Angel
description: Back against wall, arms in goalpost position, slide up and down maintaining wall contact.

name: German Hang
description: Hang from rings with arms behind body in full shoulder extension.

name: Cat-Cow
primary_muscles: [thoracic spine, lumbar spine, erector spinae, abdominals]
description: On all fours, alternate between arching (cow) and rounding (cat) the back.

name: Quadruped Thoracic Rotation
description: From all fours, hand behind head, rotate upper body opening chest toward ceiling.
progression_2: Hand Behind Head (full rotation with pause)

name: Jefferson Curl
description: Standing, slowly roll spine down vertebra by vertebra into full forward flexion.

name: Deep Squat Hold
description: Sit into full-depth squat with feet flat, hold bottom position.

name: 90/90 Hip Switch
description: Sit with both knees at 90 degrees, rotate to switch leg positions.

name: Pigeon Pose
primary_muscles: [glutes, piriformis, hip external rotators, hip flexors]
description: Front shin across body, lower hips to floor stretching external rotators and hip flexors.

name: Frog Stretch
description: On all fours, widen knees maximally, sink hips back and down.
progression_3: Flat Frog (chest and hips on floor)

name: Couch Stretch
description: Kneel with back foot against wall, front foot forward, drive hips forward.

name: Pancake Stretch
description: Seated with legs wide, hinge forward bringing chest toward floor.

name: Front Split
description: One leg forward, one back, lower pelvis toward ground with hips squared.

name: Middle Split
description: Both legs extend sideways, lower pelvis toward ground.

name: Cobra Stretch
description: Lying face-down, press chest up with arms keeping hips on floor.

name: Wall Ankle Dorsiflexion
description: Foot forward near wall, drive knee over toes keeping heel flat.

name: Wrist Circles
description: On all fours, slowly shift bodyweight in circles around wrists.

name: Scorpion Stretch
primary_muscles: [hip flexors, obliques, thoracic spine, lumbar spine]
description: Lying face-down, swing one leg up and across body toward opposite hand.
progression_3: Prone Scorpion (straight leg, touching opposite hand)

name: World's Greatest Stretch
description: Multi-step: deep lunge, elbow to floor, thoracic rotation reaching arm skyward.

name: Side-Lying Windmill
description: Lie on side with knees at 90, rotate top arm open across body toward floor behind.
